title: trifolium pratense var. frigidum
intro: Trifolium pratense var. frigidum, also known as the cold-sensitive red clover, is a subspecies of red clover (Trifolium pratense) that is native to cooler climates. This plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which are known for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium pratense var. frigidum include reducing menopausal symptoms, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of this plant include dried flowers, capsules, and teas, which can be used to promote overall well-being and address various health concerns.
